verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Once like a stranger I was to You Lord Didn't know you paid The price of redemption for me But it was my hap one day I came into Your field And through your grace and love Your Word I humbly received

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: For you are my Kinsman Redeemer In You my heart has come To love and trust I who was unworthy Has found favor in Your eyes To be your chosen bride

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Now I'm going to the House of my Redeemer And there I'll be with Him forever He's changed me from A sinner to a gleaner Now His bride who shall reign with Him The threshing days will soon be over His life in me is now glorified I'm waiting, to be taken to His garner Where I'll stand perfect forevermore.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Well my desire is unto You my Lord I've learn to walk and live By Your holy Word And Lord I've been grateful for Your extra handfuls of grace That has caused me to walk This far by faith

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Perfection is my one desire Your life alone in me I want to see My all on Your altar I'm willing to sacrifice For in You I stand complete.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Lord, not once you Have ever failed me Each day I prove more That Your Word is true I know soon that some day This mortal life of mine Will be change in a twinkle of an eye I'll be raptured up to meet You In the sky.
